headline: Super vs Orchids — personal AI agents compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: Orchids is an AI-powered app builder for developers who want to generate and deploy code through conversation. Super is a personal AI agent designed to actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache, making repeated real-world workflows faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly explains what Orchids is good at, where it stops, and why Super is the sharper alternative for durable computer-use automation.
